sql: SELECT service_name, span_name, attr_status_code, duration FROM abnormal_traces WHERE trace_id = 'dffa7ec5e49bedfea78e84da34c16e71' AND parent_span_id = '41353e43d6c0b15d' ORDER BY duration DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT DISTINCT service_name FROM abnormal_traces
SELECT DISTINCT service_name FROM abnormal_logs ORDER BY service_name LIMIT 40

SELECT DISTINCT service_name FROM abnormal_traces WHERE trace_id IN (SELECT trace_id FROM abnormal_traces WHERE service_name = 'ts-travel-plan-service' AND attr_status_code = 'Error') ORDER BY service_name

SELECT DISTINCT trace_id, service_name, span_name, attr_status_code, parent_span_id FROM abnormal_traces WHERE trace_id = '19405515c375d054c1d0001a2c64c18e' AND parent_span_id IS NULL OR parent_span_id = '' ORDER BY time LIMIT 10

SELECT trace_id, service_name, span_name, parent_span_id, span_id, attr_status_code, duration FROM abnormal_traces WHERE trace_id IN (SELECT trace_id FROM abnormal_traces WHERE attr_status_code = 'Error' LIMIT 5) ORDER BY trace_id, time LIMIT 50
SELECT service_name, level, COUNT(*) as count FROM abnormal_logs WHERE service_name = 'ts-route-plan-service' GROUP BY service_name, level
SELECT service_name, level, message, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM abnormal_logs WHERE level IN ('ERROR', 'SEVERE') GROUP BY service_name, level, message ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT DISTINCT service_name, span_name FROM abnormal_traces WHERE trace_id = '4b473aa6b4fcf711ae338597215e4a7e' ORDER BY service_name
SELECT trace_id, service_name, span_name, duration, parent_span_id FROM abnormal_traces WHERE service_name = 'ts-order-service' AND duration > 1000000000 ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 20
SELECT span_id, parent_span_id, service_name, span_name, attr_status_code, duration FROM abnormal_traces WHERE trace_id = '8452a3d8cca6b1b7cc86e123bfb9a91d' AND parent_span_id = '8e4f9565fc3144fe'
SELECT DISTINCT attr_status_code FROM abnormal_traces
SELECT service_name, level, COUNT(*) as count FROM abnormal_logs WHERE service_name = 'ts-route-plan-service' GROUP BY service_name, level

SELECT trace_id, parent_span_id, service_name, span_name, attr_status_code, duration FROM abnormal_traces WHERE trace_id IN (SELECT trace_id FROM abnormal_traces WHERE service_name = 'ts-consign-service' LIMIT 5) ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 50
SELECT service_name, metric, value, time FROM abnormal_metrics WHERE metric LIKE '%cpu%' OR metric LIKE '%memory%' OR metric LIKE '%error%' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT trace_id, service_name, span_name, attr_status_code FROM abnormal_traces WHERE trace_id = 'ec0374aeb0744e27cd6f2240f359c9f8' AND (service_name = 'ts-seat-service' OR service_name = 'ts-basic-service' OR service_name = 'ts-travel-service') ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 30
SELECT service_name, level, message, time FROM abnormal_logs WHERE service_name = 'ts-security-service' AND level IN ('ERROR', 'SEVERE', 'WARN') ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 15

SELECT span_id, parent_span_id, service_name, span_name, attr_status_code, duration FROM abnormal_traces WHERE trace_id = '85af56fad788362a447af057cf900e97' AND parent_span_id = '6760d80430345495' ORDER BY time LIMIT 15
SELECT service_name, message FROM abnormal_logs WHERE service_name = 'ts-consign-service' AND message LIKE '%[queryByAccountId]%' LIMIT 10
SELECT DISTINCT service_name FROM abnormal_traces ORDER BY service_name

SELECT trace_id, span_id, parent_span_id, service_name, span_name, attr_status_code, duration FROM abnormal_traces WHERE trace_id = 'a791bc2a2da43b135d9132218de2a13f' AND parent_span_id = '9a3040ccf86fc5c9' LIMIT 10

SELECT service_name, span_name, attr_http_response_status_code, duration FROM abnormal_traces WHERE service_name = 'ts-train-food-service' AND span_name = 'GET /api/v1/trainfoodservice/trainfoods/{tripId}' AND duration > 100000000 ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 20

SELECT trace_id, span_id, parent_span_id, service_name, span_name, attr_status_code, duration FROM abnormal_traces WHERE trace_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT trace_id FROM abnormal_traces WHERE service_name = 'ts-preserve-service' AND attr_status_code = 'Error') AND service_name = 'ts-travel-service' LIMIT 20

SELECT trace_id, service_name, span_name, attr_status_code, parent_span_id, span_id FROM abnormal_traces WHERE trace_id = '988cae666837b2fa8fd0b9d644dfd54c' AND parent_span_id = 'b167a403995e3911' ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 20

SELECT trace_id, span_id, parent_span_id, service_name, span_name, duration, attr_status_code FROM abnormal_traces WHERE trace_id = 'b536d8e5564d9d663d6d57258ce9ea78' AND parent_span_id = '2d7a65897f9f09ea' ORDER BY duration DESC LIMIT 30
SELECT service_name, metric, value, time FROM abnormal_metrics WHERE service_name = 'ts-route-plan-service' AND metric = 'queueSize' ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT message FROM abnormal_logs WHERE service_name = 'ts-ui-dashboard' AND message NOT LIKE '%handled request%' LIMIT 10

SELECT span_id, service_name, span_name, parent_span_id, attr_status_code, duration FROM abnormal_traces WHERE trace_id = 'b20155c4a8717ae987276d309cd5d6f4' AND span_id IN (SELECT span_id FROM abnormal_traces WHERE trace_id = 'b20155c4a8717ae987276d309cd5d6f4' AND parent_span_id LIKE '776%')
SELECT service_name, message, COUNT(*) as count FROM abnormal_logs WHERE level = 'ERROR' GROUP BY service_name, message ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 30

SELECT trace_id, service_name, span_name, attr_status_code, duration, parent_span_id FROM abnormal_traces WHERE trace_id = '6ea78ddeb6e5729463d61eba30a4e488' AND service_name = 'ts-travel-plan-service' ORDER BY time LIMIT 20
SELECT trace_id, service_name, span_name, attr_status_code, duration FROM abnormal_traces WHERE attr_status_code = 'Error' ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 30
SELECT service_name, metric, value, time FROM abnormal_metrics WHERE service_name = 'rabbitmq' ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 30
SELECT message FROM abnormal_logs WHERE service_name = 'ts-travel-plan-service' AND level = 'SEVERE' LIMIT 5
SELECT trace_id, service_name, span_name, attr_status_code, duration FROM abnormal_traces WHERE trace_id = '859cc7c2281c1e578fd060db0c332553'
SELECT DISTINCT service_name FROM abnormal_metrics ORDER BY service_name LIMIT 50

SELECT span_id, parent_span_id, service_name, span_name, attr_status_code, duration FROM abnormal_traces WHERE trace_id = 'ae82eb1e63954bfc27680c49906a861e' AND service_name = 'ts-train-food-service' ORDER BY duration DESC LIMIT 15
SELECT service_name, level, message FROM abnormal_logs WHERE level IN ('ERROR', 'SEVERE') ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 50
SELECT trace_id, service_name, attr_status_code, duration, span_name, parent_span_id FROM abnormal_traces WHERE attr_status_code = 'Error' ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 30

SELECT trace_id, service_name, span_name, parent_span_id, span_id, attr_status_code, duration FROM abnormal_traces WHERE trace_id = '2052cacf4db472f463f27532579d877a' AND service_name = 'ts-route-plan-service' ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 15
SELECT trace_id, service_name, span_name, attr_status_code, duration FROM abnormal_traces WHERE attr_status_code = 'Error' AND service_name != 'loadgenerator' ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 20
SELECT service_name, attr_status_code, span_name, duration, trace_id, parent_span_id FROM abnormal_traces WHERE attr_status_code = 'Error' ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 30
SELECT service_name, message, time FROM abnormal_logs WHERE service_name = 'ts-preserve-service' ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 30
SELECT DISTINCT service_name FROM abnormal_traces ORDER BY service_name
SELECT service_name, level, message FROM abnormal_logs WHERE service_name = 'ts-inside-payment-service' AND level = 'ERROR' LIMIT 10
SELECT trace_id, service_name, span_name, parent_span_id, duration, time FROM abnormal_traces WHERE service_name = 'ts-route-service' AND duration > 5000000000 ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 30
SELECT trace_id, service_name, span_name, attr_status_code, duration FROM abnormal_traces WHERE trace_id = '0e212450176ee645daba229d3de60e99' ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT service_name, level, message FROM abnormal_logs WHERE service_name = 'ts-preserve-service' AND level = 'ERROR' LIMIT 20
SELECT trace_id, service_name, span_name, attr_status_code, duration, parent_span_id, span_id FROM abnormal_traces WHERE parent_span_id = '' OR parent_span_id IS NULL ORDER BY time ASC LIMIT 30
SELECT trace_id, service_name, span_name, parent_span_id, duration FROM abnormal_traces WHERE trace_id = 'fe504f8053ce408d449eb14dbbd7d809' ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT service_name, attr_http_response_status_code, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM abnormal_traces WHERE attr_http_response_status_code >= 500 GROUP BY service_name, attr_http_response_status_code ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 20
